name: Fresh Tuna (Aku) Portuguese Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together vinegar, water, garlic, and MSG.
2. Pour the mixture over fish slices and let stand for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove fish from marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan.
5. Sprinkle filets with salt, pepper, and flour.
6. Cook in oil until lightly brown.
7. Serve with Sour Dough French bread. Use stale bread as fresh bread will be soggy.
8. Pour the remaining oil from the frying pan.
9. Add the leftover marinade and bring to a boil.
10. Dip pieces of bread in marinade.
